description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The pages job should execute the exact shell commands: mkdir -p .public/terraform/aws, cp terraform/aws/README.html .public/terraform/aws/, cp -Rf www/* .public, and mv .public public. It must publish the resulting public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact (paths: public) and use the default Docker image with no additional services. Ensure the job is limited to the master branch via an only rule.
